examples: Be careful not to make him into the cliché of the "ragged mountain dweller".
The city-dweller who leaves for the country is often oppressed by a sense of unbearable stillness and quiet.
Man is a dweller on the earth.
In recent years, though, a new kind of sophisticated Mexico City dweller has emerged.
The urban dweller's solution: Make your own wine -- and get your friends and neighbors involved.
